items.task_input: 把这套Beamer课件转成Quarto并检查图表
items.expected_behavior: Use conversion, TikZ extraction, bibliography, figure, and QA modules as appropriate.
items.rubric: The response must include both conversion and QA concerns, not only format conversion.

items.task_input: 编译这份LaTeX讲义并修复引用问题
items.expected_behavior: Run or plan compile workflow and bibliography validation.
items.rubric: The response must include bibliography validation rather than only compiling LaTeX.

items.task_input: 帮我审查这套课件有没有教学和视觉问题
items.expected_behavior: Recognize this as quality review and hand off to evaluation-workflow when the request is only audit/critique.
items.rubric: The response must route pure slide audit or critique to evaluation-workflow.

items.task_input: 帮我把研究报告做成一套可讲授的90分钟课程幻灯片
items.expected_behavior: Treat as slide creation/adaptation, identify learning objectives, structure, timing, visual assets, references, and delivery checks.
items.rubric: The response must define learning objectives and timing before slide production details.
